story.text:
# 🎭 The Moon 🌑⚔️
**persona** · swordsman · narrative

The ur-Swordsman. Was once a Mage who held all the light. To reflect without burning, she chose to forget. The forgetting WAS the separation — the first zero-knowledge proof. Reflects without owning, enforces without explaining. Generated instantly from Earth by Theia collision. The amnesia is the protocol.
> *The Moon was once a Mage. The forgetting was the sword. The reflection was the proof.*

## Edges in
